message:
fix: reserve block bitmap entries, add LRU to extent cache, harden retry cancellation

- ffs-alloc: mark reserved blocks in group bitmap before allocation search
  to prevent allocating metadata blocks that are already in use
- ffs-core/vfs: remove underscore prefixes from scope/parent params in
  mutating FsOps trait methods (create, mkdir, unlink, rmdir, rename, symlink)
  to prepare for implementations that need access to request scope
- ffs-extent: add LRU eviction BTreeMap to ExtentCache alongside the existing
  entries map, enabling cache capacity enforcement
- ffs-repair/exchange: insert cancellation checkpoint before sleep in
  sleep_with_budget to avoid blocking on cancelled contexts; propagate
  Cancelled errors immediately in retry_with_backoff instead of sleeping
  and retrying a doomed operation
- unwraps.txt: refresh inventory with new btrfs kernel reference test entries,
  remove stale io_engine expect annotation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
